title: ourisia ruellioides
intro: Ourisia ruellioides, also known as the rock daisy or New Zealand rock daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ourisia ruellioides include its potential to treat various ailments, including wounds, infections, and digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
